zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor De Clifton於1333年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆時，她的父親Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham27歲，母親Eleanor de Mortimer19歲。她於大約1372年與John Mauteby在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1403年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor De Clifton于1333年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可巴肯哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham27岁，母亲Eleanor de Mortimer19岁。她于大约1372年与John Mauteby在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1403年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor De Clifton was born in 1333, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham, was 27 and her mother, Eleanor de Mortimer, was 19. She married John Mauteby about 1372, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1403, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor De Clifton est née en 1333, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Mortimer, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Mauteby environ 1372, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1403, à l’âge de 70 ans.

Sie hat um 1372 in England, United Kingdom John Mauteby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1403 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

Lei sposato John Mauteby circa 1372, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1403, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor De Cliftonが1333年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenhamは27歳，母Eleanor de Mortimerは19歳であった。約1372年にイギリスイギリスでJohn Mautebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1403年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor De Clifton(이)가 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Mortimer(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1372년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Mauteby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor De Clifton родилась в 1333 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Adam de Clifton Baron Clifton de Buckenham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Mortimer, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mauteby около 1372 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1403 г. в возрасте 70 лет.
